name: Medallion Metals Limited
description: Medallion Metals Limited is a Western Australian-based minerals exploration and development company focused on its flagship Ravensthorpe Gold Project. Located at the intersection of the Southern Cross greenstone belt and the Albany Fraser Orogen, the company aims to establish a long-life, low-cost gold and copper mining operation. Medallion is currently advancing its development strategy, including the potential acquisition of infrastructure from the Forrestania Nickel Operation to accelerate production. With a commitment to resource growth and near-mine exploration, the company is positioned to become a significant contributor to the Western Australian gold and copper mining landscape.
